pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:ORIGINATOR]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:FILED]->(m1:Filing {name: '2010 to 2015'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.tld DESC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.amount > 500000 RETURN e.name AS EntityName, e.location AS Location ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Filing) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.amount > 500000 RETURN n.name, n.location

gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {name: 'China'})<-[:COUNTRY]-(e:Entity)<-[:BENEFITS]-(f:Filing) RETURN f
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:beneficiary_bank]->(m0:Entity {name: 'China'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.beneficiary_bank_country = 'United Kingdom' AND f.amount > 200000 RETURN count(f) AS number_of_filings

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing {sar_id: "3297"})-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity) RETURN e.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE f.begin.year = 2013 RETURN c.name AS Country, count(f) AS Filings ORDER BY Filings DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:BENEFITS]-(m0:Filing) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.tld DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing) WITH e, count(f) AS numberOfFilings RETURN e.name AS entityName, numberOfFilings ORDER BY numberOfFilings DESC
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Filing) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num DESC

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE f.begin_date_format =~ '.*-01-.*' OR f.begin_date_format =~ '.*-02-.*' OR f.begin_date_format =~ '.*-03-.*' OR f.begin_date_format =~ '.*-04-.*' OR f.begin_date_format =~ '.*-05-.*' OR f.begin_date_format =~ '.*-06-.*' RETURN c.name AS country, COUNT(f) AS filings_count ORDER BY filings_count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:BENEFITS]-(m0:Filing) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.begin_date_format <> '2017-09-05T00:00:00Z' RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.begin_date DESC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.beneficiary_bank_country = 'United Kingdom' AND f.originator_bank_country = 'Singapore' RETURN f ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)<-[:COUNTRY]-(e:Entity)<-[:BENEFITS]-(f:Filing) WITH c.name AS country, COUNT(DISTINCT e) AS beneficiary_bank_count ORDER BY beneficiary_bank_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN country, beneficiary_bank_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:beneficiary_bank]-(m0:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WITH c, sum(f.amount) AS totalAmount ORDER BY totalAmount DESC RETURN c.name AS countryName, totalAmount LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Entity)-[r1:BENEFITS]->(m1:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.amount DESC LIMIT 10

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: 'Australia'}) RETURN f ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:ORIGINATOR]->(m0:Entity {name: 'Australia'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.amount DESC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(o:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(oc:Country),       (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(b:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(bc:Country) WHERE o.country <> b.country RETURN f.id, f.amount, f.originator_bank, f.beneficiary_bank ORDER BY f.id LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:beneficiary_bank]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:originator_bank]-(m1:Entity {name: 'Singapore'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.begin_date ASC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: "United Kingdom"}) WITH e, COUNT(f) AS transaction_count ORDER BY transaction_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN e.name AS entity_name, transaction_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)-[r0:FILED]->(m0:Filing)-[r1:BENEFITS]->(m1:Entity {name: 'United Kingdom'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.amount DESC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.amount > 100000 RETURN f ORDER BY f.begin ASC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:CONCERNS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.amount > 750000 RETURN e.name AS concerned_entity, f.amount AS filing_amount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Filing) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.amount > 750000 RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)<-[:COUNTRY]-(:Entity) WITH c.tld AS tld, count(*) AS frequency ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5 WITH collect(tld) AS topTlds MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE country.tld IN topTlds RETURN sum(f.amount) AS total_amount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:originator_bank]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:has_tld]-(m1:TLD) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.originator_bank_country IN (n.originator_bank.country) RETURN n.amount AS answer
